name: KakaoPay
description: KakaoPay — South Korea digital wallet and payment service by Kakao Corp with QR, NFC, and online merchant integration APIs.

seo.title: KakaoPay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: KakaoPay: KakaoPay — South Korea digital wallet and payment service by Kakao Corp with QR, NFC, and online merchant integration APIs.

when_to_use: QR and NFC payment acceptance for Korean offline and online merchants
KakaoPay digital wallet checkout for Korean e-commerce platforms
In-app payment integration via KakaoPay for Korean super app ecosystem
Mobile payment acceptance for Korean retailers via Kakao Corp platform

pros: Largest wallet adoption in South Korea
QR, NFC, and online checkout in one SDK
cons: Settlement tied to Korean banking cycles
review.verdict: If you sell to Korean consumers, KakaoPay is nearly mandatory — conversion lift justifies setup work.
review.best_for: Korean-market merchants wanting maximum wallet reach
review.not_for: Global SaaS without a Korean consumer base
